title: Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple
tagline: Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Dibbesvara Temple (also known as Dibbalingeswara Swamy Temple or Dibbi Lingeswara Temple) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in the village of Saripalli in
overview.description: Dibbesvara Temple (also known as Dibbalingeswara Swamy Temple or Dibbi Lingeswara Temple) is a medieval Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, located in the village of Saripalli in Vizianagaram district, Andhra Pradesh, India. The temple is recognised as a centrally protected monument and is maintained by the Archaeological Survey of India under its Amaravati Circle.

topPlaces.name: Saripalli
topPlaces.description: Saripalli is a village in Nellimarla mandal of Vizianagaram district in Andhra Pradesh, India. Located on the banks of Champavathi River, Saripalli is famous for Dibbi Lingeswara Swami temple, constructed between the seventh and tenth centuries by Kalingas, featuring beautiful sculptures on the temple walls; and Ramalingeswara Swamy temple on a small hillock near adjacent to the village of Saripalli.

topPlaces.name: Ramateertham
topPlaces.description: Ramateertham (also spelled Ramatheertham) is a village and panchayat in Nellimarla mandal of Vizianagaram district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located about 12 kilometres from Vizianagaram city.

topPlaces.name: Nellimarla
topPlaces.description: Nelli-marla is a town in Vizianagaram district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is in Nellimarla mandal of Vizianagaram revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kumili
topPlaces.description: Kumili is a historical village and panchayat in Pusapatirega mandal of Vizianagaram district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram mandal
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram mandal is one of the 34 mandals in Vizianagaram district of Andhra Pradesh, India. Vizianagaram city is the headquarters of the mandal.

topPlaces.name: Gajularega
topPlaces.description: Gajularega is a census town in Vizianagaram district in the state of Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Vizianagaram Estate
topPlaces.description: Vizianagaram Estate was a zamindari of the Madras Presidency in India. The name is derived from its founder Raja Vijayaram Raj who established a sovereign kingdom by claiming independence from the kingdom of Jeypore in 1711.

topPlaces.name: Jarjapupeta
topPlaces.description: Jarajapupeta is a census town in Vizianagaram district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Nellimarla mandal of Vizianagaram revenue division.

Located on the banks of Champavathi River, Saripalli is famous for Dibbi Lingeswara Swami temple, constructed between the seventh and tenth centuries by Kalingas, featuring beautiful sculptures on the temple walls; and Ramalingeswara Swamy temple on a small hillock near adjacent to the village of Saripalli.

Ramateertham (also spelled Ramatheertham) is a village and panchayat in Nellimarla mandal of Vizianagaram district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located about 12 kilometres from Vizianagaram city.

Kumili is a historical village and panchayat in Pusapatirega mandal of Vizianagaram district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

Vizianagaram Estate was a zamindari of the Madras Presidency in India. The name is derived from its founder Raja Vijayaram Raj who established a sovereign kingdom by claiming independence from the kingdom of Jeypore in 1711.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (53 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dibbesvarasvamipur Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Saripalli, Ramateertham, Nellimarla, Kumili, Vizianagaram mandal.
